summary: Fix 9 failing tests in job-service repository layer by implementing testcontainers for automated PostgreSQL lifecycle management during test execution

user_stories.i_want: tests to automatically provision and teardown a real PostgreSQL database
user_stories.so_that: I can run integration tests locally and in CI without manual database setup
acceptance_criteria: Tests pass without requiring external PostgreSQL running
Testcontainers spins up PostgreSQL container automatically
Database is properly cleaned between tests
Containers are torn down after test completion

user_stories.so_that: other services can use the same testing infrastructure
acceptance_criteria: Function returns connection string and cleanup function

user_stories.i_want: tests to run in isolated containers
user_stories.so_that: test runs are reproducible and don't interfere with each other
acceptance_criteria: Each test run uses unique container
Tests can run in parallel safely
No port conflicts between concurrent test runs

functional_requirements.title: Testcontainers Integration
functional_requirements.description: Integrate testcontainers-go library to manage PostgreSQL container lifecycle during tests

functional_requirements.title: Test Database Helper Package
functional_requirements.description: Create internal/testutil/db.go with reusable database setup and cleanup functions

functional_requirements.title: Test Suite Migration
functional_requirements.description: Update job_assignment_test.go to use testcontainers instead of hardcoded localhost connection

functional_requirements.title: Migration Support
functional_requirements.description: Test database should run migrations before test execution

functional_requirements.title: Test Isolation
functional_requirements.description: Each test should have a clean database state with proper rollback/cleanup

functional_requirements.title: Cost Tracking & Quota Management
functional_requirements.description: Per-user and per-department print quotas, cost allocation, budget alerts
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Core enterprise requirement, table stakes for business sales

functional_requirements.title: Secure Print Release
functional_requirements.description: Users authenticate at printer with PIN, badge, or mobile app to release jobs
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Essential security feature for regulated industries

functional_requirements.title: Print Policy Engine
functional_requirements.description: Configurable rules for print permissions, color/BW enforcement, size limits
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Key cost control feature for organizations

functional_requirements.title: Advanced Audit Logging
functional_requirements.description: Immutable logs of all print activity with user, document, time, outcome
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Required for compliance and security auditing

functional_requirements.title: Mobile & Email-to-Print
functional_requirements.description: Print from mobile devices or email documents directly to print queue

functional_requirements.title: Analytics Dashboard
functional_requirements.description: Cost analysis, usage trends, environmental impact reports

non_functional_requirements.requirement: Test container startup should not significantly slow down test execution
Test database credentials should be isolated from production
non_functional_requirements.metric: Separate test credentials, no access to production data

non_functional_requirements.requirement: Test utilities should be reusable across all services
non_functional_requirements.metric: Support for auth, registry, storage, notification services

non_functional_requirements.requirement: Containers must always be cleaned up even on test failure

risks.risk: Docker daemon not available in all CI environments
risks.mitigation: Provide fallback to mock-based tests or use CI with Docker-in-Docker support

risks.risk: Testcontainers may slow down test execution significantly
risks.mitigation: Reuse single container across test suite with proper database truncation between tests

risks.risk: Port conflicts when running tests in parallel
risks.mitigation: Testcontainers automatically assigns random available ports

risks.risk: Migrations may fail in test database
risks.mitigation: Include migration rollback in cleanup, use separate test schema

implementation_phases.name: Dependencies & Setup
tasks: Verify Docker daemon availability in test environment

implementation_phases.name: Test Suite Migration
tasks: Add TestMain function for container lifecycle
Ensure proper cleanup with defer statements
Run tests and verify all 9 tests pass

implementation_phases.name: Documentation & Reuse
tasks: Document testcontainers usage for other services
Verify tests pass in CI environment

key_gaps: Cost allocation and quota budgeting per user/department
Secure print release with authentication at device
Sensitive data detection and content auditing
unique_selling_points: Cloud-native microservices architecture for horizontal scalability
Modern Go stack with OpenTelemetry observability built-in
API-first for easy integration and custom workflows
Support for both S3 and local storage backends
OIDC and SAML support for enterprise SSO
